ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lipids" (
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lipid */,
  "lipid_name" TEXT /* Name of the lipid */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the lipid */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the lipid */,
  "lipid_type" TEXT /* Type of lipid */,
  "lipid_class" TEXT /* Class of lipid */,
  "lipid_subclass" TEXT /* Subclass of lipid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fragmentation_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fragmentation pattern */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid the fragmentation pattern belongs to */,
  "precursor_ion" REAL /* Precursor ion for the fragmentation pattern */,
  "product_ion" REAL /* Product ion for the fragmentation pattern */,
  "mass_to_charge_ratio" REAL /* Mass-to-charge ratio for the fragmentation pattern */,
  "collision_energy" REAL /* Collision energy used to generate the fragmentation pattern */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument used to generate the fragmentation pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fragmentation_patterns_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipids ("lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_lipids" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Abundance of the lipid in the dataset */,
  "lipid_abundance" REAL /* Abundance of the lipid in the dataset */,
  "lipid_identification_method" TEXT /* Method used to identify the lipid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is affiliated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "project_dataset_role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_pmid" TEXT /* PMID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
